creator: david.elliott3040@gmail.com
text:
Raspberry pi zero 2W doesn't boot with the current instance of rpi-firmware.

Using the firmware files directly from https://github.com/raspberrypi/firmware/
using commit: a60a479844915911901a8ddc36221eddfdded07f allows the pizero2 to boot.

A simple workaround is to duplicate bcm2710-rpi-3-b.dtb with the name bcm2710-rpi-zero-2-w.dtb

I have tested the new firmware with a Pi3b and the pi zero 2b and they both appear to boot 14-CURRENT with no issues.

I can patch the port if you want to track the a60a479 commit instead and pull down the extra dtb files.
